title: My Nether's Delight
description: New Nether addon for Farmer's Delight
body:
📖 About:

My Nether's Delight is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight based around adding culinary content to the nether!  it is also the most personal reimagining of my old mod Nether's Delight!!! 

still available for those who don't like the changes and additions I implemented-

Using advanced hunting techniques and culinary skills, you can manage to prepare a myriad of disgusting meals and moss-covered snacks, and even survive a little longer in the Nether!
This Addon Mod for Farmer's Delight focuses on giving more content to the Nether to satisfy our desire to eat the infernal creatures!


📦 Beta Version

  • This mod is currently under development, so issues and instabilities may occur. If you'd like to play, keep in mind:
  • Backup your saves often;
  • Make sure everything is working before adding it to a modpack;
  • Report any issues you find to our Github!! It helps us a lot!
  • If you want to support me you can donate in my KO-FI :D

 

🎂 Features :

◉ Pungent Effect: Subtracts a percentage of your hearts but prevents you from burning out- if you have fire protection armor or the fire resistance effect you regenerate when near heat sources
◉ Poaching: A new Enchantment/Cursed for Axes/Swords that allows you to get FD ingredients without the Knife!!! be careful when choosing your prey or you might get a scare...

 

🌱 Crops :

◉  Powdery Cannon: A bamboo in its emo stage, with explosive and spicy berries...
◉  Powdery Cane: Similar to the Cannon but smaller and thinner, only its base is useful to get gunpowder, in the right soil can even yield more berries-

 

🍄 New ingredients:

◉  Bullet Pepper: Very spicy and bright, Not advisable to eat it in very hot places without precaution. 
◉  Strider Egg:  Did you know that Striders are Ovoviviparous? If you manage to open its hard shell then you can use it as an egg replacement, although it is also quite nutritious raw, especially if you are sick.
◉  Strider Slice: Gummy texture and impossible to cook, it is somewhat dangerous to eat it alone and unminced.
◉  Hoglin Loin: Has many unique uses in the kitchen, its flavor is positioned between pork and beef.
◉  Hoglin Sausage: Nothing better than a couple of them roasted, anyone want a hotdog?
◉  Ghasta: there's no flour in the nether, but a chef(t) needs to use what's around they. ghast tastes like rice noodles-

 

📦 New Blocks:

◉  Powdery Wood Set: Bamboo Set is at its worst emo stage, sorry.
◉  Nethers Trophies: Who doesn't want a Hoglin Trophies on their mantelpiece? Be sure to wax it if you don't want your living room to reek of rotting flesh....
◉  Letios Compost: When the land forgets even its name,  any crop will feel comfortable in it.
◉  Resurgent soil: Almost every plant or crop feels comfortable in this soil, if you want to moisten need fire instead of water.
◉  Fungus Colony: Some Nethers Fungus form colonies when they are on top of Resurgent Soil.

 

📝 FAQ:

  • why does the Pungent Effect have two icons?
      The bullet pepper icon is used when the effect damages the player when close to flames
      The heart icon is used when it regenerates when close to flames (the player has a resistance to fire damage).

  • why does my Bullet Pepper never grow to a Powdery Cane?
      It is an invasive plant that does not belong to the current biomes, it grows very slowly on gravel and crimson nylium- If you plant it in resurgent soil it will grow faster and even fruit at its base.
      The resurgent soil is able to make each plant feel in its home biome, so keep that in mind.

  • Can I use this mod in my modpack?
      Yeah! you can use this mod in your modpack....
      but please use the Modrinth download and do not rehost the files.

  • Fabric Version?
    Do you want to enjoy the new MND stuff but you're using Fabric?
    Thanks to MerchantPug, now you can!! My Nethers Delight Now playable on Fabric!! you can find it here!


Special thanks to Sarinsa and Umpaz for their help in coding

Also many thanks to TCGhost for the Pungent Effect icons.
